catalysts.event: Q3 FY2025 earnings report expected to show continued ARR acceleration and margin expansion
Federal zero-trust mandate deadlines driving accelerated government contract awards
Falcon Flex licensing model gaining traction, improving net retention rates
Potential inclusion in additional market indices as market cap and profitability thresholds are crossed

risks.event: Ongoing class action lawsuits from the July 2024 global IT outage could result in material financial settlements
Elevated valuation leaves stock vulnerable to multiple compression if growth decelerates
Increasing competition from Microsoft Defender, SentinelOne, and Palo Alto Networks in endpoint and cloud security
Customer trust erosion from the July 2024 outage could slow new logo acquisition in risk-averse industries
Potential reduction in IT security budgets during an economic slowdown

correlation_with_holdings: High correlation with existing holdings. CRWD is a technology stock in the cybersecurity sub-sector. The existing portfolio (NVDA, AAPL, TSLA) is 100% technology-weighted. Adding CRWD would further increase technology sector concentration, exposing the portfolio to correlated drawdowns during tech selloffs or rising interest rate environments.
